prompt: A surreal collage merging elements of the ocean and desert, featuring waves flowing into sand dunes, under a sky split between sunny and starry night.
prompt_refined: A surreal, dreamlike collage where elements of a vast ocean seamlessly merge with an expansive desert. Towering waves appear to flow directly into and transform into golden sand dunes, creating a single, continuous, impossible landscape. Above this merged terrain, the sky is sharply bisected, with one half portraying a bright, sunny daytime and the other half a deep, star-filled night.
objects: seamless merge/transition of ocean and desert
impossible landscape (formed by merged waves and dunes)
